name: Blog / insights teaser
structure: section header + 3-col article cards (image, date, title, excerpt, read-more)
prevalence: 64% of scraped sites have a blog/news area; absent in built templates
visual: 3-card 'latest insights' row: image, date, title, excerpt, read-more; or a news/Merkblätter list.
placement: Late page, before the final CTA/footer.
states: Card hover lift; read-more arrow translate.
animation: Cards stagger fade-up; image zooms gently on hover; read-more arrow translates.
realWorld: 64% of scraped CH sites have a blog/news area
